message:
feat(distributed): add DistributorTransport trait for replica symbol dispatch

Introduces a `DistributorTransport` trait that abstracts the network
layer for distributing authenticated symbols to replicas.  The trait
has a single async method `send_symbols` that accepts a replica ID and
a batch of `AuthenticatedSymbol` values, returning a `ReplicaAck` on
success or `ReplicaFailure` on error.

This decouples the distribution logic from any specific transport
implementation (gRPC, in-memory, etc.), enabling both production
transport backends and deterministic test doubles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
